one_time_description: Acquisition of intangible assets (fishing licenses) for $17,746,985 financed by new long-term debt of $18,904,856
economic_notes: Consolidated entities include Potlotek Expedition Gas and Convenience (gas bar) and First Nations Fisheries Interest Group (7.14% interest). Large acquisition of fishing licenses ($17.7M) in 2021.
notes: Major acquisition of intangible assets (fishing licenses) worth $17,746,985 funded primarily by new long-term debt of $18,904,856, causing net debt to increase from $10.7M to $28.7M. Accrued remittances payable of $4.9M (CRA payroll $3.7M + WCB $1.2M) is notably high. Audit report dated September 23, 2022 — over 17 months after fiscal year end. expenses_enterprises calculated as gas bar ($3,666,109) + fisheries commercial ($1,415,263). Note 5 incorrectly shows columns labeled 2022/2021 instead of 2021/2020.
